# terminal_address (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "terminal_address" "example_address" {
  city = "Anytown"
  country = "US"
  name = "John Doe"
  street1 = "123 Main St"
  zip = "12345"
  phone = "5555555555"
  province = "CA"
  street2 = "Apt 1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `city` (String) City of the address.
- `country` (String) ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the address.
- `name` (String) The recipient's name.
- `street1` (String) Street of the address.
- `zip` (String) Zip code of the address.

### Optional

- `id` (String) ID of the shipping address to get.
- `phone` (String) Phone number of the recipient.
- `province` (String) Province or state of the address.
- `street2` (String) Apartment, suite, etc. of the address.

### Read-Only

- `data` (Attributes) Physical address associated with a Terminal shop user. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data))

<a id="nestedatt--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data`

Read-Only:

- `city` (String) City of the address.
- `country` (String) ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the address.
- `created` (String) Date the address was created.
- `id` (String) Unique object identifier.
The format and length of IDs may change over time.
- `name` (String) The recipient's name.
- `phone` (String) Phone number of the recipient.
- `province` (String) Province or state of the address.
- `street1` (String) Street of the address.
- `street2` (String) Apartment, suite, etc. of the address.
- `zip` (String) Zip code of the address.
